texto: ♔ Writing is my passion. I never want to let it go. It may be short, Fan-Fiction or purely my own work. But it is my kingdom, I am the princess. For all the noble readers in the kingdom, I bring them joy with tales. My knights that protect me, are my fellow writers. The dragon would be the inspiration for my writing. The fortune teller would be my best friend, giving me hope. The castle would be Wattpad, it keeps everything protected. ♔
explicacao: Citação de BritHoran sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “♔ Writing is my passion. I never want to let it go. It may be short, Fan-Fiction or purely my own…” articula motivacao, writing, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e inspiracao.
